FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY
Taking Karakatwas which are not relevant for a planet leads
to wrong interpretations and predictions. Hence it is very important
to know the specific Karakatwas of each planet. That knowledge
must be properly applied in predictional part of astrology.
Chart of Directional Aspects
PLANETARY DIRECTIONS ARE UNIQUE TO NADI
SYSTEM OF ASTROLOGY
N E s w
Pisces Aries \ Taurus Gemini
w Aquarius Cancer N
s Capricorn Leo E
Sagittarius Scorpi.ol Libra Virgo
E N w s
The above chart of Directional aspects is very important in
Nadi system.
In the Universal Rasi Chart, Aries is the fire house; Taurus
the second and so on till pisces, which is the 12th house. The 1st
5th and 9th houses in the universal Chart represent East direction.
